holdings.infoBox: QAT is an equity ETF with a total of 71 individual holdings. The top holdings are Qatar National Bank (Q.P.S.C.) stock at 23.10%, Qatar Islamic Bank (Q.P.S.C.) at 13.55%, Industries Qatar Q.P.S.C. at 6.42%, Ooredoo Q.P.S.C. at 4.56%, and The Commercial Bank (P.S.Q.C.) at 4.41%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Qatar ETF (QAT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI All Qatar Capped index, a market-cap-weighted index of large-, mid and small-cap Qatari companies. QAT was launched on Apr 29, 2014 and is issued by BlackRock.
